calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-29-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker, via Zoom, for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA), Petitioner.

Ms. Boessenecker reports of the efforts made by the SFPA to locate Kerry Philipsen and advises that five of seven heirs have field nominations and does not believe that additional efforts to locate Kerry Philipsen should be required.

The court advises that notice requirement to Kerry Philipsen is being dispensed with solely regarding this petition and notes that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. The San Francisco Public Administrator is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-29-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
